title: State and Federal Revenue Sources
description: This policy covers the sources of revenue that a school district receives from state and federal government funding. It addresses how those funds are obtained and the general framework for relying on state and federal financial support to help fund district operations and programs.
description_local: This policy relates to the district's annual operating budget and financial planning processes, as well as the board's authorization of specific financial actions, such as submitting grant applications. It applies to the school district as a whole, guiding how school board members make and approve key financial decisions. For parents and community members, this matters because it reflects how the district manages and pursues funding that can directly impact programs, resources, and services available to students.
